10.response: {"Q0":"The only thing I wasn't totally clear about was to do with the green ice. I wasn't sure if I mined ice from a planet if that ice only had a chance to be the same color as it's planet or if it could've been either."}

6.response: {"Q0":"I only collected the gems for the astronaut that remained. "}

11.response: {"Q0":"I'm not really sure. There was a lot to keep track of, so perhaps it had to with multitasking or something similar."}

0.response: {"Q0":"I didn't use any particular strategy, I just tried to stay as focused as possible throughout the study."}

7.response: {"Q0":"Not really. I still kept digging on the planets that had astronauts available."}

9.response: {"Q0":"I tried to give both halves equal focus, but I think I ended up paying more attention to the digging. I missed a couple of galaxies when my mind wandered for a split second."}

1.response: {"Q0":"I didn't change my technique during the game."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I usually tried for the better odds of winning. Sometimes I took a bigger risk for a slightly large sum, but I tried to play it safe for the most part."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I made sure to take note and tried to remember."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I understood that I wouldn't be able to sell my gems of that color."}

12.response: {"Q0":"I had no issues of any sort."}
